etymology: Virgil = guide (as in Dante's guide); Ackerman = field-man
wordplay_note: A guide through the fields of simulated politics
card_description: Virgil Ackerman (meaning "Virgil = guide (as in Dante's guide); Ackerman = field-man") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. Elderly industrialist and last person who remembers the real Nicole Thibodeaux. Name note: A guide through the fields of simulated politics. Memory as resistance — the man who knows the First Lady is a robot. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: Elderly industrialist and last person who remembers the real Nicole Thibodeaux
reference.etymology: Virgil = guide (as in Dante's guide); Ackerman = field-man
